content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features touch loaders.py broadly (mine: path_transform param on BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader; yours: fallback_searchpath on FileSystemLoader). We can't be fully disjoint, so let's minimize line overlap in FileSystemLoader specifically: I'll append 'path_transform' as the LAST kwarg in each __init__ signature (after your fallback_searchpath if you add yours first in the list), and my only change inside each get_source/get_loader body is ONE line at the very top applying the transform (e.g. 'if self.path_transform is not None: template = self.path_transform(template)' with original name preserved for TemplateNotFound). Please keep your fallback_searchpath logic appended AFTER the existing primary search loop in get_source (not rewriting it), and similarly append-only changes in list_templates. That way our diffs touch different lines. OK to proceed on this basis?

content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (path_transform on BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, and FileSystemLoader)
note: Finished. In FileSystemLoader I added path_transform as the last __init__ kwarg (after followlinks - I don't have your fallback_searchpath change in my copy since we're apparently in separate repo instances, so I couldn't literally layer on top of your edit, but conceptually mine is a pure addition: transform template at top of get_source, wrap split_template_path in try/except to preserve original name in TemplateNotFound, and raise with original at the end). If our patches do get merged, my kwarg should slot in right after your fallback_searchpath param, and my try/except around split_template_path + 'raise TemplateNotFound(original)' at the end of the primary loop should compose fine with your appended fallback loop before the final raise - just make sure the fallback loop's final raise also uses 'original' if it wants transformed lookups to report the pre-transform name. All 40 existing loader tests still pass. Thanks for the clean split!
